title: x402 access gate hardening — Merkle-bound credit (v2)
summary: Closes the v1 free-witness tautology: the access-threshold check is now bound to a real settlement-written receipt in the canonical receipt tree, not an invented balance. Verified on both layers.

circuit.ceremony: single-party devnet (locally-generated pot14) — re-ceremony required before mainnet

program.name: dark_x402_access_gate
program.root_binding: root must equal one of the canonical receipt tree's recent roots (rejects a self-made tree with Custom(11))

grade_circuit_layer.V1_old_tautology_reproduced: PASS — a v1 proof with an invented balance verifies
grade_circuit_layer.A1_forge_amount: PASS — witness generation fails (Merkle unsatisfiable), no proof can exist
grade_circuit_layer.A5_proof_lending: PASS — verify false with a swapped agent_commitment

grade_chain_layer.L1_legit_access: PASS — Merkle-bound proof accepted on-chain, single-use x402_nullifier PDA created
grade_chain_layer.A3_self_made_root: PASS — Custom(11) (root not in canonical receipt tree)
grade_chain_layer.A6_cross_scope: PASS — Custom(1) (scope_hash public-input mismatch fails verification)

reproduce.build_and_circuit_grade: docker build -t x402v2-bench sandbox/x402v2 && docker run --rm --network none -v $PWD/circuits:/mnt/circuits:ro -v $PWD/build:/mnt/build:ro x402v2-bench
reproduce.onchain_e2e: docker run --rm -v <devnet-keypair>:/key.json:ro -v $PWD/sandbox/x402v2/out/art/v2:/art:ro -v $PWD/build:/mnt/build:ro -e GATE=Ew4kwn4B... -e RECEIPT_TREE=H9nL9tErF... --entrypoint bash x402v2-bench -c 'cp /mnt/build/zk/x402-access-v2-e2e.mjs /work/ && cd /work && node x402-access-v2-e2e.mjs'
